The following events took place in '''38 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]'''.

==Events==
*[[Shafr Center Press/Legends|The Shafr Center Press]] published ''[[The Shafr Anthology of Galactic Language, Second Edition]]''.<ref name="Written Word">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/source/writtenword/index.html?page=1|text=The Written Word|int=The Written Word}}</ref>
*Major [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operations were reestablished on [[Nyriaan/Legends|Nyriaan's]] surface by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]. Since the CSA avoided [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], they were economically and industrially solvent enough to rebuild their old facilities and continue their former operations unhindered.<ref name="Galaxy of Intrigue">''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]''</ref>

==Deaths==
*[[Ordith Huarr's wife]], on [[Lorrd/Legends|Lorrd]] {{Circa}}<ref name="Betrayal25">''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'', Chapter 25</ref>
*[[Cargeloch]]<ref name="CatCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{Mo}}
